title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF DASMARIÃAS RELOCATION CENTER HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO DASMARIÃAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 290 / 90 OG No. 31, 4488 (Aug. 1, 1994)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7713, May 05, 1994 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF DASMARIÃAS RELOCATION CENTER HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO DASMARIÃAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The name of Dasmariñas Relocation Center High School in the Municipality of Dasmariñas, Province of Cavite, is hereby changed to Dasmariñas National High School.

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Lapsed into law on May 5, 1994 without the President's signature, pursuant to Sec. 27(1), Article VI of the Constitution.
